description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after a cartoonish, bipedal crocodile or alligator character with a light blue body and a large, rounded cream-colored belly. It features a series of prominent pink spikes running from the top of its head down its back to the tip of its tail, giving it a playful and distinctive appearance. The toy has a wide, open mouth with visible white teeth, and its eyes are expressive with black markings underneath, adding to its animated look. Its arms are short and outstretched, while its legs are thick and slightly bent, suggesting a sturdy, huggable form. The surface appears soft and plush, typical of a stuffed toy, with no visible seams or accessories. The overall design is whimsical and friendly, making it appealing for children and collectors alike.
description: A soft, plush stuffed toy resembling a cartoon crocodile with a blue body, cream belly, and pink back spikes. It has an open mouth, expressive eyes, and a playful, huggable form.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's open mouth, wide-set eyes, outstretched arms, and the full cream-colored belly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the pink spikes along the back, and the tail extending behind.
description_view_2: Top view displays the alignment of the pink spikes from head to tail and the broad, rounded body shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the head profile, spikes, and tail, with the arm and leg positions visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and playful, with a wide open mouth showing teeth and large, lively eyes. The absence of eyebrows and the upward curve of the mouth contribute to a friendly, inviting look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms outstretched to the sides and legs bent forward, the head is held high and the tail extends behind.
